page_metadata.biotools__summary: The package is designed for visualization of RNA-related genomic features with respect to the landmarks of RNA transcripts, i.e., transcription starting site, start codon, stop codon and transcription ending site.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The package is designed for visualization of RNA-related genomic features with respect to the landmarks of RNA transcripts, i.e., transcription starting site, start codon, stop codon and transcription ending site.
